_meta.title: Green-AI Platform — Capability Build Checklist
_meta.purpose: Track done-criteria for each of the 24 generic capabilities. Use during implementation sprints. A capability is DONE only when ALL criteria in done_when_all_true are satisfied.

legend.done_when_all_true: Checkable criteria. Tick each off in order.

milestones.M0: Golden Core — minimal portal, user can log in and access workspace
milestones.M1: Operational Platform — admin can manage tenants/users/workspaces
milestones.M2: Developer Surface — API keys, webhooks, bulk import
milestones.M4: Advanced Auth — SAML2, SCIM, Azure AD SSO

capabilities.name: app_settings
done_when_all_true: ApplicationSettings table created and migrations applied
SettingKey enum created with all 20 platform keys
IApplicationSettingService implemented (Get, GetBool, GetInt, GetList, SaveAsync, CreateDefaultsAsync)
CreateDefaultsAsync() called at app startup and is idempotent (run twice = no error)
Full-load in-memory cache implemented — invalidates on SaveAsync
Unit tests: Get returns defaultValue when key missing, SaveAsync invalidates cache

capabilities.name: structured_logging
done_when_all_true: Logs, RequestLogs, OutgoingRequestLogs tables created
ISystemLogger interface defined with 5 log-level methods
DatabaseLogger implementation: writes to Logs table via Dapper
OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler DelegatingHandler registered for all HttpClient instances
RequestResponseLoggingMiddleware: off by default, active when RequestLogLevel > 0
FatalEmailLogger: sends synchronous email on Fatal level
ApplicationInsightsLogger: conditional on AppSetting.ApplicationInsightsConnectionString
Unit tests: ISystemLogger.LogError writes to Logs with correct LogLevelId=40
Sensitive field redaction implemented (password, token fields stripped from request body)

capabilities.name: multi_tenancy
done_when_all_true: Tenants table created with correct columns
TenantUserMappings junction table created
ITenantService implemented (GetById, GetTenantsForUser, Create, Update, SoftDelete)
Soft delete pattern confirmed: Deleted=true + DateDeletedUtc. Never hard delete.
Unit tests: GetTenantsForUser returns only tenants where mapping exists
Architecture test: every domain service table in project has TenantId column (automated check via reflection or migration review)

capabilities.name: workspace_scoping
done_when_all_true: Workspaces table created
WorkspaceUserMappings table created
WorkspaceCapabilities seed table created (empty at launch)
WorkspaceCapabilityMappings junction created
WorkspaceTypes reference table created with at least 1 seed value
IWorkspaceService implemented (all 7 methods)
Unit tests: CanUserAccessWorkspace returns false when mapping does not exist
Unit tests: GetWorkspacesForUser filters by TenantId AND UserId both

capabilities.name: role_based_access_control
done_when_all_true: UserRoles table seeded with 8 platform roles
UserRoleMappings table created (NO TenantId column — by design)
TenantRolePolicies table created (renamed from sms-service's confusing CustomerUserRoleMappings)
Unit tests: UserRoleMappings has no TenantId column — verify this is intentional in test comment
UserRoleNames static class with 8 string constants (not IDs)

capabilities.name: health_monitoring
done_when_all_true: GET /health endpoint exists and returns 200
Response schema: {status, version, timestamp, checks[]}
DB connectivity check included (SELECT 1, latency measured)
AppSettings cache check included
Endpoint requires NO authentication
HTTP 503 returned when DB check fails
Sensitive config never exposed in health response

capabilities.name: authentication
done_when_all_true: Users table created with all columns including PasswordHash, PasswordSalt, PasswordResetToken, FailedLoginCount, IsLockedOut
UserRefreshTokens table created
IAuthenticationService implemented with Argon2id (NOT SHA256)
ILoginHandler.LoginAsync implemented with lockout check
JWT generated with 15-min TTL from AppSetting(AccessTokenTtlMinutes)
RefreshToken generated with 480-min sliding TTL from AppSetting(RefreshTokenTtlMinutes)
Password reset GUID token flow implemented
HTTP 403 returned for locked-out user (not 401)
HTTP 200 returned for password-reset-request even when email not found (prevent enumeration)
Unit tests: VerifyPassword returns false for wrong password
Unit tests: Login increments FailedLoginCount on wrong password
Unit tests: Login returns 403 when IsLockedOut=true
Integration test: full login → token → refresh → new token flow
CONFIRMED: password hashing uses Argon2id, NOT SHA256 (explicit assertion in test)

capabilities.name: permission_service
done_when_all_true: IPermissionService implemented with all 6 methods
Per-request in-memory cache (NOT distributed cache)
CanUserAccessTenant: looks up TenantUserMappings
CanUserAccessWorkspace: looks up WorkspaceUserMappings
DoesUserHaveRole: looks up by UserRoles.Name (not ID)
DoesWorkspaceHaveCapability: looks up by WorkspaceCapabilities.Name (not ID)
CapabilityNames static class: string constants for all capability names
SuperAdmin bypasses CanUserAccess* but NOT DoesWorkspaceHaveCapability
Unit tests: unauthorized tenant access returns false
Unit tests: SuperAdmin bypasses tenant check
Unit tests: SuperAdmin does NOT bypass capability check

capabilities.name: session_management
done_when_all_true: ICurrentUser interface defined (7 properties) — single definition, never duplicated
HttpCurrentUser implementation registered as Scoped
CurrentUserMiddleware registered after JWT bearer, before all controllers
Middleware: TenantId=0 → HTTP 401 (hard stop)
Middleware: WorkspaceId=0 → HTTP 401 (or 300 for workspace selection)
POST /api/auth/select-workspace implemented
POST /api/auth/select-tenant implemented
GET /api/auth/refresh implemented (sliding TTL extension)
JobCurrentUser: implements ICurrentUser for batch context
Unit tests: CurrentUserMiddleware returns 401 when TenantId=0
Unit tests: Select-workspace updates User.CurrentWorkspaceId in DB
Architectural rule confirmed: grep for 'class.*ICurrentUser' returns exactly 2 results (Http + Job)

capabilities.name: localization
done_when_all_true: Languages table seeded (Danish=1, Norwegian=5, English=3 minimum)
LocaleStringResources table created with UNIQUE index on (LanguageId, ResourceName)
ILocalizationService implemented (GetString, GetAllForLanguage, InsertOrUpdate, EnsureKeyExistsInAllLanguages)
GetString returns key name on missing (never null, never exception)
InsertOrUpdate auto-creates 'Missing Translation' rows for all published languages
GET /api/localization/{languageId} endpoint returns full dictionary
Full in-memory cache per language. Invalidated on label update.
Minimum 200 labels seeded (login flow, navigation, form validation, common errors)
Unit tests: GetString returns key when resource missing
Unit tests: InsertOrUpdate creates rows for all 3 seeded languages

capabilities.name: transactional_email
done_when_all_true: IEmailService defined with 4 methods
SmtpEmailService implemented as primary/fallback
SendGridEmailService implemented (conditional on AppSetting.SendGridApiKey)
Subject + body fetched from ILocalizationService — no hardcoded English strings in service code
SendFatalAlertAsync sends SYNCHRONOUSLY (does not use async queue)
All other sends: async fire-and-forget with 3-retry, logs failure
Password reset email template keys seeded in LocaleStringResources
Invite email template keys seeded in LocaleStringResources
Integration test: password reset end-to-end (mock SMTP/SendGrid)

capabilities.name: file_storage_abstraction
done_when_all_true: FileTypes allowlist table seeded (csv, xlsx, png, pdf minimum)
IBlobStorageService implemented (Upload, Download, Delete, GetSasUrl, Exists)
BlobContainers static class with container name constants
Upload validation: extension checked against FileTypes BEFORE calling IBlobStorageService
SAS URL TTL: configurable, default 60 minutes
Unit tests: upload with disallowed extension returns error before calling blob storage
Integration test (optional): round-trip upload+download against local Azurite emulator

capabilities.name: user_management
done_when_all_true: IUserService implemented (all 9 methods)
Create user: generates GUID invite token, sends invite email via IEmailService
Invite token stored as PasswordResetToken with 48h expiry (AppSetting InviteTokenTtlHours)
SoftDelete sets Deleted=true + DateDeletedUtc
Email uniqueness enforced on create and update
GetUsersForTenantAsync: only returns non-deleted users | SuperAdmin sees all tenants
Unit tests: SoftDelete sets both Deleted=true AND DateDeletedUtc
Unit tests: Create returns 409 on duplicate email
Unit tests: GetUsersForTenantAsync excludes deleted users

capabilities.name: audit_trail
done_when_all_true: ActivityLogs, ActivityLogEntries, ActivityLogTypes tables created
ActivityLogTypes seeded with 9 platform types
IActivityLogService implemented (Create, CreateBatch, GetLogs)
ActivityLogEntries store ResourceKey only — never resolved text (test comment explains why)
GetLogsAsync resolves ResourceKey via ILocalizationService.GetString at read time
ResourceKey naming convention followed: 'activityLog.{entity}.{action}'
ActivityLogEntries immutable: no UPDATE/DELETE in service code
Unit tests: CreateLogAsync inserts exactly 1 ActivityLog + 1 ActivityLogEntry row
Unit tests: GetLogsAsync resolves ResourceKey via localization

capabilities.name: background_jobs
done_when_all_true: Jobs, JobTasks, JobTaskStatuses, ClientEvents tables created
Jobs table seeded with at least 1 platform job (e.g. DataRetentionCleanup)
JobCurrentUser implemented (ICurrentUser for batch context)
Minimum 1 IHostedService with correct loop + cancellationToken handling
Every job execution creates JobTask + JobTaskStatus row
IHostedService: unhandled exceptions caught + logged, service continues next iteration
Unit tests: JobCurrentUser returns expected UserId/TenantId from job metadata
Unit tests: IHostedService catches exception and does not crash worker loop

capabilities.name: admin_ui_operations
done_when_all_true: SuperAdmin: Create/Delete tenant endpoint implemented
SuperAdmin: Impersonate user endpoint implemented (logs ImpersonatingUserId to ActivityLog)
TenantAdmin: Invite user to tenant endpoint implemented
TenantAdmin: Create/delete workspace endpoint implemented
TenantAdmin: Add/remove workspace capability endpoint implemented
WorkspaceAdmin: Add/remove user from workspace endpoint implemented
CloneWorkspaceTemplate operation implemented
All admin mutations create ActivityLog entries
TenantAdmin restrictions enforced: cannot manage other tenant's workspaces
SuperAdmin impersonation test: ActivityLog contains ImpersonatingUserId

capabilities.name: data_retention
done_when_all_true: MonthsToRetainDeliveryData + MonthsToRetainLogs added to Tenants table
DataRetentionCleanupJob implemented as IHostedService (or Quartz job)
DRY_RUN mode: logs what WOULD be deleted without deleting
Cleanup creates ActivityLog entry per tenant per run
FilteredRecipients excluded from automated cleanup (manual/GDPR only)
Unit test: cleanup with DRY_RUN=true deletes 0 rows
Unit test: cleanup deletes rows older than retention period

capabilities.name: real_time_push
done_when_all_true: ClientEvents table short TTL enforced (10-15 min)
ClientEventBackgroundService polls ClientEvents every 1-2 seconds
GET /api/events/stream SSE endpoint implemented with authentication
Client receives JobTask.StatusCode updates via SSE without polling REST
ClientEvents cleanup job deletes events older than TTL
Manual test: open browser, trigger a background job, status appears in UI without page refresh

capabilities.name: bulk_import
done_when_all_true: ImportConfigurations and ImportJobs tables created
POST /api/import/upload returns HTTP 202 Accepted (not 200 — never block on large files)
File validated against FileTypes allowlist before upload to blob
Import runs in background (IHostedService or separate job)
Row errors do NOT fail entire import — captured in ImportJob.ErrorDetails
ActivityLog entry on completion: 'Import of N contacts completed. E errors.'
GET /api/import/{importJobId} status endpoint implemented
SavedImportConfiguration reuse: second import can reference first run's column mapping
Unit tests: upload with oversized file returns 400 before hitting blob storage

capabilities.name: webhook_delivery
done_when_all_true: WebhookSubscriptions and WebhookDeliveryAttempts tables created
Webhook registration: secret never stored plaintext (SHA256 hash stored, plaintext returned once)
Outbound HTTP delivery: HMAC-SHA256 signature in X-Webhook-Signature header
Exponential retry: 1, 5, 30, 120, 480 minutes. 5 failures → subscription deactivated.
All delivery attempts logged in WebhookDeliveryAttempts
WorkspaceCapability 'Webhooks' gate enforced
Unit test: delivery with non-200 response triggers retry scheduling
Unit test: HMAC-SHA256 signature can be verified by recipient using shared secret

capabilities.name: public_api
done_when_all_true: WorkspaceApiKeys table created (KeyHash column, NOT plaintext key)
API key format: 'sk_live_' + 32 random chars
Key generation: plaintext returned EXACTLY ONCE. Only KeyPrefix + KeyHash stored.
API authentication: Authorization: Bearer <key> → SHA256(key) lookup in WorkspaceApiKeys
WorkspaceCapability 'PublicApi' gate enforced
All /api/v1/ endpoints are versioned from day 1
Rate limiting middleware configured (default 100 req/min per workspace)
Unit test: SHA256(generatedKey) == stored KeyHash
CONFIRMED: no plaintext key in DB after creation (explicit assertion in test)

capabilities.name: contact_lists
done_when_all_true: ContactLists and Contacts tables created
ContactLists scoped to WorkspaceId — cannot cross workspace boundary
Phone validation: E.164 format required when phone is set
Contact list expansion is lazy (at send time, not at save time)
WorkspaceCapability 'ContactLists' gate enforced
Unit tests: GetContactsForList returns only contacts in specified workspace

capabilities.name: message_templates
done_when_all_true: MessageTemplates and TemplateAttachments tables created
Template engine decision documented in ai-governance decision registry
MergeFieldNames static class: no magic strings in template rendering code
Templates scoped to WorkspaceId
Rendering happens at SEND TIME
Attachment stored via IBlobStorageService (CAP-17), blob path stored in TemplateAttachments
Unit tests: template rendering substitutes all {{key}} values from merge fields

capabilities.name: consent_management
done_when_all_true: ConsentLists, ConsentEntries, FilteredRecipients tables created
Filter chain order enforced: 1) national opt-out, 2) consent list, 3) duplicate, 4) scope restriction
FilterReason is typed string constant (FilterReasonNames class) — never free-text
FilteredRecipients immutable: no DELETE except GDPR erasure path
WorkspaceCapability 'ConsentManagement' gate enforced
Unit tests: recipient filtered for each FilterReason type, correct reason stored

capabilities.name: federated_authentication
done_when_all_true: TenantSamlSettings table created
ScimTokenHash on Tenants: SHA256 — NOT plaintext (sms-service security issue avoided)
SAML2 SSO: redirect to IdP, validate assertion signature, extract email claim
All federated auth paths converge at same JWT issuance function as standard login
SCIM 2.0 POST/PUT/DELETE /scim/v2/Users endpoint implemented
SCIM bearer token validated via SHA256(bearer) == Tenants.ScimTokenHash
Certificate renewal procedure documented (SAML cert expiry risk)
Integration test: SSO flow end-to-end with test IdP metadata

M0_golden_core.acceptance: Developer can: register, receive invite email, log in, select workspace, make authenticated API call. System logs all events. Health endpoint returns 200.

M1_operational_platform.acceptance: Tenant admin can: create workspace, invite users, assign capabilities. Background jobs run. All actions are audited.

M2_developer_surface.acceptance: Developer can: get API key, query API, receive webhook deliveries, upload bulk import files.

M3_engagement_layer.acceptance: Operator can: define contact lists, create message templates, enforce consent filters.

M4_advanced_auth.acceptance: Enterprise customers can use SAML2 SSO and SCIM provisioning.
